title: Issue In Creating subitem
excerpt:

We are getting response as null, please advice if this is expecte…

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
1. We have tried creating subitem for item which has more than 350 files , not able to create sub item for it , is there any limitation to create sub item?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

Would you please send an email to appsupport@monday.com with the full query you are using and the response you are getting + a timestamp (Date, hour, minute and location) of the last time you tried to run the mutation?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias
